TeacherTools Data-ready reporting
Home Pricing FAQ Contact
Local-only beta Open TeacherTools

Simple pricing for classrooms and teams.

Start free while everything runs locally. Move to Pro or School when sync and sign-in arrive.

Free

Everything runs in your browser. Upload CSV/XLSX, generate AI comments, scan marks, and export without limits.

  • Unlimited file uploads
  • AI comment generation
  • Marking Assistant (OCR)
  • Print view and exports
  • Seating plan generator
Use Free

Pro (coming soon)

Account-based access with cloud save, shared templates, and priority support.

  • Secure sign-in
  • Cloud save across devices
  • Team template sharing
  • Priority support

School

Site licenses for multiple teachers with centralized settings, onboarding, and deployment help.

  • Multi-seat planning
  • Centralized admin
  • Training sessions
  • Purchase orders supported
Talk to us

Billing transparency

TeacherTools is free while it is local-only. Paid tiers will appear once sync and sign-in ship. We will give existing users advance notice before any features move behind a paywall.

Need a purchase order?

Email us for invoicing, purchase orders, or multi-seat quotes. We support school board procurement processes.
